alternative_name.description: Any alternative name by which the primer may be known

owner_id.description: id of the owner - if omitted, will default to your member id

sequence.description: The nucleotide sequence of the primer

tag.description: A unique label or tag associated with the primer

gene_id.description: A reference ID linking the primer to a specific gene in your lab

tm.description: The melting temperature (Tm) of the primer

orientation.description: Indicates the orientation of the primer. Set "1" for forward and "0" for reverse. This field is optional and can be left null if orientation is not applicable

target_position.description: The specific binding position of the primer on the target DNA

fragment_size.description: The size of the DNA fragment that the primer is designed to amplify

organism.description: The specific organism for which the primer is designed, such as "Mouse"

used_for.description: The specific applications for which the primer is used (pcr / RT / SDM / etc.)

restriction_site.description: Information about any restriction enzyme recognition sites incorporated into the primer design

source.description: The origin or source from which the primer was obtained

description.description: A detailed description of the primer
